name: How to get your Facebook business page verified
description: If you're looking to get your Facebook business page verified, this guide will show you how. We'll cover what verification is, why you might want to get verified, and how to go about doing it.
main_title: How to get your Facebook business page verified | Synup
richtext: Since Facebook can remove as many as 600 million fake accounts each month, it is safe to say that inauthentic user profiles are a significant problem for the social media platform.  A good number of business users are scattered among these fake accounts. While many of them are harmless or even reverential to the companies and brands they claim to represent, others can cause real damage to your business’ reputation and financial bottom line.
